channel.title: Cal Raleigh on Emerald City Gear
channel.description: Recent content in Cal Raleigh on Emerald City Gear

item.title: Unfinished Business: The Seattle Mariners' 2026 Season Preview
item.description: The Mariners lost the ALCS in seven games last year. Now they're back — 50 years in, hungrier than ever, and opening at home Thursday against Cleveland. Here's what to expect.

item.title: $95 Million Before a Single MLB At-Bat: The Mariners Just Bet Big on Colt Emerson
item.description: The Mariners signed top prospect Colt Emerson to a historic $95 million extension before he's even debuted. Here's why this deal should have Seattle fans absolutely buzzing.

item.title: Big Cat Strikes Again: Cal Raleigh's Walk-Off Lifts Mariners to 2-0 Series Lead Over Yankees
item.description: Cal Raleigh's walk-off single caps back-to-back 2-1 wins over the Yankees to open the 2026 season. Plus: what's coming up at T-Mobile Park in April — including the Ichiro statue unveiling.

item.title: Rough Start: Mariners Drop Opening Day, But the Series Isn't Over
item.description: The Mariners fell 6-4 to Cleveland on Opening Day, but there's still plenty to build on — and three more games against the Guardians this weekend before the Yankees roll into town.
